tasks.direction_relation_note: Implements the next concrete slice from the supersession roadmap: Slice 1 capability detection and mode skeleton so parallel mode can enter as a supervisor-first shell state before any agent launch.
tasks.title: Add parallel mode readiness snapshot and shell entry skeleton
tasks.description: Introduce the first operator-visible supersession slice by adding explicit parallel mode entrypoints, durable readiness checks for git/worktree/push/gh/planning, and a placeholder supersession prepare surface that reports ready, degraded, or blocked state without disturbing normal-mode session browsing while parallel mode is off.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed the control-tower placeholder slice by shipping the read-only supervisor snapshot model and multi-panel supersession board, which now becomes the base surface for later runtime lifecycle wiring.
tasks.title: Build supervisor board with roster, pool, and distributor placeholders
tasks.description: Shipped the read-only supervisor snapshot model and supersession board layout with Capabilities, Pool Board, Agent Roster, Selected Detail, Distributor, and Queue panels plus shell-tail summaries, leaving runtime lifecycle and queue data binding for later follow-up slices.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit 019c820 and PR #253 after adding the read-only supervisor snapshot model, multi-panel supersession board, and shell-tail summaries with cargo build/test verification.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed in main session via commit `76e0fcd` and merged PR #268 after defining a versioned serde-backed official completion refresh contract and switching prompt rendering to use that serialized JSON payload directly at the planning service boundary.
tasks.title: Define serialized completion refresh contract for official ledger updates
tasks.description: Shipped `PlanningOfficialCompletionRefreshPayload` and `PlanningOfficialCompletionRefreshContract` as the versioned official ledger-update contract, rewired official completion prompt rendering to consume that serialized JSON directly, and verified contract round-trip, prompt rendering, and turn submission runtime coverage.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit `76e0fcd` and PR #268, closing the first serialized completion refresh slice for ledger-owned official updates.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed in main session via commit `4e03c10` and merged PR #269 after replacing the parallel-mode runtime-only refresh payload with shared `PlanningOfficialCompletionRefreshContract` handoff across runtime, worker orchestration, and official-completion prompt paths.
tasks.title: Reuse official completion refresh contract across worker and runtime APIs
tasks.description: The official completion refresh path now reuses one shared versioned contract across parallel-mode runtime handoff, worker orchestration, and prompt rendering: `parallel_mode_service.rs` returns `PlanningOfficialCompletionRefreshContract` directly, `post_turn_execution.rs` forwards it unchanged to the worker request, `planning_worker_orchestration_service.rs` accepts the shared contract shape, and the removed runtime-only payload export is no longer re-exposed.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session with commit `4e03c10` and merged PR #269, closing the shared refresh-contract reuse slice with targeted formatting and runtime/planning regression coverage.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed in main session via commit `89962ae` and merged PR #270 after teaching official completion refresh to reject an unchanged repeated queue head as `commit_ready`, pause auto-follow with an explicit failure reason, and keep the leased slot reserved for operator recovery instead of returning it prematurely.
tasks.title: Gate official reassignment on ledger refresh completion
tasks.description: Official reassignment is now blocked until hidden planning worker refresh finishes and the planning runtime reloads the refreshed ledger snapshot; repeated unchanged queue-head results after official refresh now fail with an auto-follow pause reason and preserve the leased slot for operator recovery instead of advancing assignment or cleanup.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit `89962ae` and merged PR #270, closing the assignment-gating and repeated-queue-head pause path for official completion refresh.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed in main session via commit `60151f0` and merged PR #271 after upgrading the official completion refresh contract to carry `refresh_order`, reserving that order before the background worker starts, redirecting official refresh execution to the shared planning workspace, and serializing same-workspace official refreshes so they run strictly one at a time in reserved completion order.
tasks.title: Serialize official completion refresh ordering across agents
tasks.description: Shipped end-to-end official refresh ordering: `src/domain/planning.rs` now versions the contract with `refresh_order`, `parallel_mode_service.rs` reserves and propagates the shared completion order, `post_turn_execution.rs` acquires the order on the main thread before launching the background worker and targets the shared planning workspace, and `planning_worker_orchestration_service.rs` serializes same-workspace official refreshes in reserved order with targeted contract/runtime regression coverage.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit `60151f0` and PR #271, closing the remaining multi-completion official refresh ordering requirement in the ledger-feedback-loop direction.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed the first pool runtime slice by replacing placeholder pool data with git/worktree-backed reconcile snapshots, deterministic akra pool-root discovery, and cleanup-aware slot-state classification on the supervisor board.
tasks.title: Implement akra pool reconcile and slot lease cleanup state
tasks.description: Shipped the first GitWorkspacePort-backed pool runtime slice that reconciles the default akra slots, computes deterministic pool-root naming, classifies missing, idle, awaiting_cleanup, blocked, and unavailable states from git/worktree inspection, and caches supervisor snapshots in the TUI so pool inspection does not rerun on every render.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit 46ae69e and PR #254 after adding git/worktree-backed pool reconcile, cleanup-aware slot classification, TUI snapshot caching, and cargo build/test verification.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed the next pool execution slice by splitting read-only inspect from mutating reconcile and adding actual akra baseline creation, missing slot provisioning, and merged-slot cleanup execution under the supervisor refresh path.
tasks.title: Implement akra slot provisioning and cleanup execution flow
tasks.description: Shipped the mutating akra reconcile flow so `:parallel on` and refresh can create the local akra baseline branch, provision missing default slots, clean merged agent branches, and reset or delete reusable slots back toward idle without manual filesystem intervention.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit 904f695 and PR #255 after adding mutating akra reconcile, slot provisioning, merged-slot cleanup execution, and cargo build/test verification.

tasks.direction_relation_note: Completed the durable lease lifecycle slice by adding persisted slot lease records, `leased/running/cleanup_pending` transitions, and cleanup-state projection so the akra pool can now track ownership and merged cleanup readiness across refreshes.
tasks.title: Persist akra slot leases and running-state transitions
tasks.description: Shipped persisted akra slot lease records under `.leases/*.json`, lifecycle transition APIs for `leased`, `running`, and `cleanup_pending`, guardrails for branch/worktree ownership and akra integration checks, and cleanup inspection updates that now surface durable lease-backed slot states instead of inferred projections.
tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit 3cf56d1 and PR #256 after adding persisted lease storage, lifecycle transition APIs, cleanup-state inspection updates, service tests, and cargo build/test verification.

tasks.title: Surface operator recovery notices for non-merged slot branches

tasks.priority_reason: Completed in main session via commit `73f59d1` and merged PR #267, closing the remaining pool-side blocked-state visibility gap for non-merged slot branches.
